ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( TEXT(Category__c) = "Development", NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Site__r.strk__Site_Type__c))), OR( TEXT(Site__r.strk__Site_Type__c) = "BTS", TEXT(Site__r.strk__Site_Type__c) = "BTS-P", TEXT(Site__r.strk__Site_Type__c) = "DDBTS", TEXT(Site__r.strk__Site_Type__c) = "DDBTS-P" ), UPPER(TEXT(Site__r.strk__Site_Type__c)) != UPPER(TEXT(Project_Type__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please check project type , it needs to match site type
